original text:
Comfortable, cup-shaped disposable mask. With exhalation valve and a high-performance filter. Protects against very fine dust, smoke, fumes, and bacteria. Dual elastic straps. Pliable nose clips. Conforms to EN 149:2001+A1:2009.
Particulate Filter 755 P3 R, 2 pcs.
Gas Filter 755 A1, 2 pcs.
